revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

State of survival of a building or artefact, whether by historical accident or through a combination of protection and active conservation.


Reference: Stirlingcharter 

(This definition was noted at the IALA Seminar on the Practical Aspects of Lighthouse Preservation in Gothenburg 2005)
